photojournalism.newsExtreme.title: News extreme
photojournalism.newsExtreme.description: Catastrophic, world-altering, and extreme global news events and disasters
examples: a highly infectious computer worm shuts down global hospital networks and medical devices
a huge protest against an ai company that's taken over people's jobs
a major new discovery in the world of robotics
the first human brain-computer interface is successfully implanted, allowing telepathic communication
a new designer drug takes the world by storm, causing a major public health crisis
a legendary ghost ship, missing for a century, suddenly drifts into a busy harbor with no crew aboard

photojournalism.newsNormal.title: News normal
photojournalism.newsNormal.description: Standard major news headlines covering science, politics, business, and society
examples: a major cultural festival, celebrating the traditions and customs of a particular group or region
a major civil rights movement, such as the fight for lgbtq+ equality or women's rights
a technological breakthrough, such as a new form of renewable energy or a cure for a major disease
a historic moment, such as the first manned mission to mars or the discovery of a new planet
a major climate disaster, such as a tornado or a record-breaking heatwave
a breakthrough in agricultural technology allows crops to be grown in arid, desert conditions

photojournalism.newsSpecific.title: News specific
photojournalism.newsSpecific.description: Highly detailed, specific descriptions of major global news events and crises
examples: a historic peace accord: two neighboring countries sign a landmark treaty ending decades of border conflict
a critical space rescue: an international crew of astronauts executes a daring spacewalk to repair a damaged life-support system
a stunning scientific achievement: fusion energy researchers achieve net energy gain for the first time, marking a major milestone for clean power
a major high-tech art heist: armed thieves bypass advanced security systems to steal a famous modern masterpiece from a gallery in paris
a historic moment: the first manned mission to mars successfully lands on the red planet, opening up a new era of space exploration
a major celebrity scandal: a top hollywood actor is caught in a massive cheating scandal, leading to the collapse of his marriage and a major hit to his career

photojournalism.styleProtest.title: Style protest
photojournalism.styleProtest.description: Various photographic styles and techniques used in photojournalism and documentary photography
examples: tintype and wet plate photography: employing historic nineteenth-century processes to produce highly textured, hauntingly historicized portraits
action photography: capturing the movement and energy of the protesters in action
macro photography: focusing on the small details of protests and individual participants
aerial photography: providing a unique and expansive view of the protests and the surrounding environment
analog film photography: using traditional 35mm or medium format film to create a raw, grain-textured aesthetic with natural color tones
artistic photojournalism: using creative techniques and visual storytelling to convey the mood and emotions of the protests

photojournalism.types.title: Types of photojournalism
photojournalism.types.description: Diverse subjects and thematic beats covered in photojournalism and documentary reporting
examples: war and conflict photography, documenting the impact of violence on civilians

set.moviegenBench.title: Benchmark prompt set from MovieGenBench
set.moviegenBench.description: MovieGen Video Bench contains 1003 diverse prompts testing various aspects including human activities (motion, emotions), animals, nature/scenery, physics (fluids, gravity, collisions), and unusual subjects/activities. The prompts provide comprehensive coverage across high, medium and low motion scenarios.
examples: The camera zooms in on a fast-paced ping-pong game, focusing on the rapid back-and-forth movement of the ball.
The gentle bubbling and evaporation of water in a natural hot spring, with mist rising and drifting across the surrounding landscape.
an adorable kangaroo wearing purple overalls and cowboy boots taking a pleasant stroll in Mumbai India during a winter storm
Visitors move through the grand cathedral, light streaming through stained glass windows and casting colorful patterns on the floor as they gaze up at the high ceilings.
A raccoon wearing a detective's hat, solving mysteries with a magnifying glass and a notebook.
A person floating in a bubble, drifting over a bustling cityscape.

set.parti.title: PartiPrompts

a store front that has the word ‘openai’ written on it.
a white background with a large blue circle
A set of 2x2 emoji icons with happy, angry, surprised and sobbing faces. The emoji icons look like pandas. All of the pandas are wearing colorful sunglasses.
a futuristic city in synthwave style
A close-up of two mantis wearing karate uniforms and fighting, jumping over a waterfall.
